meaning: n.炉边,家庭adj.炉边的,亲切的,无拘无束的
examples: Meantime the Rat, warm and comfortable, dozed by his fireside.
“We have a lot of problems, so nobody can relax,” he conceded in his latest fireside chat.
At the city gate and by your fireside I have seen you prostrate yourself and worship your own freedom.
After a fireside gin and tonic and a dinner of dal bhat, or lentil soup and rice.
The match is around 9 minutes long, around the same time as the original Fireside Duel.
